column1: As a registered customer, I want to reset my password via email, so that I can regain access to my account if I forget it.
As an online shopper, I want to filter search results by price range, so that I can find products within my budget.
As a warehouse manager, I want to receive a low-stock alert when inventory falls below a threshold, so that I can reorder before running out.
As a premium subscriber, I want to download my invoices as PDF, so that I can submit them for expense reimbursement.
As a support agent, I want to see a customer's order history on their profile, so that I can resolve tickets faster.
